title: Latvian Athletics Association
summary: The Latvian Athletic Association (Latvian Latvijas Vieglatlētikas savienība) is the governing body for the sport of athletics in Latvia.
text:
The Latvian Athletic Association (Latvian Latvijas Vieglatlētikas savienība) is the governing body for the sport of athletics in Latvia.

Affiliations
World Athletics
European Athletic Association (EAA)
Latvian Olympic Committee

National records
LVS maintains the Latvian records in athletics.
